content.query:
use nyc_taxi_discovery;

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://datatocrunchproject8adls.dfs.core.windows.net/nyc-taxi-data/raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/part-00000-tid-6133789922049958496-2e489315-890a-4453-ae93-a104be9a6f06-106-1-c000.snappy.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result];

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result];

---- Identifying the inferred data types
exec sp_describe_first_result_set N'
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/'',
        DATA_SOURCE = ''nyc_taxi_data'',
        FORMAT = ''PARQUET''
    ) with (
        VendorID INT,
    lpep_pickup_datetime datetime2(7),
    lpep_dropoff_datetime datetime2(7),
    store_and_fwd_flag CHAR(1),
    RatecodeID INT,
    PULocationID INT,
    DOLocationID INT,
    passenger_count INT,
    trip_distance FLOAT,
    fare_amount FLOAT,
    extra FLOAT,
    mta_tax FLOAT,
    tip_amount FLOAT,
    tolls_amount FLOAT,
    ehail_fee INT,
    improvement_surcharge FLOAT,
    total_amount FLOAT,
    payment_type INT,
    trip_type INT,
    congestion_surcharge FLOAT
    ) AS [result]';

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) with (
    -- VendorID INT,
    -- lpep_pickup_datetime datetime2(7),
    -- lpep_dropoff_datetime datetime2(7),
    -- store_and_fwd_flag CHAR(1),
    -- RatecodeID INT,
    -- PULocationID INT,
    -- DOLocationID INT,
    -- passenger_count INT,
    -- trip_distance FLOAT,
    -- fare_amount FLOAT,
    -- extra FLOAT,
    -- mta_tax FLOAT,
     tip_amount FLOAT,
    -- tolls_amount FLOAT,
    -- ehail_fee INT,
    -- improvement_surcharge FLOAT,
    -- total_amount FLOAT,
    -- payment_type INT,
    trip_type INT
    -- congestion_surcharge FLOAT
    ) AS [result];


----------------- Reading Parquet Data from Folders & Subfolders ---------------

SELECT
    result.filepath() as file_path,
    --result.filename() as file_name,
    count(*) as total_count
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=*/month=*/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
group by result.filepath()
ORDER BY result.filepath();

SELECT
    result.filepath(1) as year,
    result.filepath(2) as month,
    --result.filename() as file_name,
    count(*) as total_count
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=*/month=*/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
group by result.filepath(1),result.filepath(2)
ORDER BY result.filepath(1),result.filepath(2);

SELECT
    result.filepath(1) as year,
    result.filepath(2) as month,
    --result.filename() as file_name,
    count(*) as total_count
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=*/month=*/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
where result.filepath(1) = 2020
group by result.filepath(1),result.filepath(2)
ORDER BY result.filepath(1),result.filepath(2);
